# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Secure User Authentication
Description: A simple user authentication plugin with password hashing.
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name

Text Domain: secure-authentication
*/

// Hook for handling the user registration form submission
add_action('register_form', 'handle_user_registration');

function handle_user_registration() {
    if (isset($_POST['wp-submit'])) {
        $username = sanitize_text_field($_POST['user_login']);
        $email = sanitize_email($_POST['user_email']);
        $password = sanitize_text_field($_POST['user_password']);

        if (empty($username) || empty($email) || empty($password)) {
            echo '<p class="error">All fields are required.</p>';
        } else {
            $hashed_password = password_hash($password, PASSWORD_DEFAULT);
            $user_id = wp_insert_user(array(
                'user_login' => $username,
                'user_email' => $email,
                'user_pass' => $hashed_password
            ));

            if (!is_wp_error($user_id)) {
                echo '<p class="message">Registration successful! Please log in.</p>';
            } else {
                echo '<p class="error">' . $user_id->get_error_message() . '</p>';
            }
        }

        wp_die();
    }
}

// Hook for handling the user login form submission
add_action('wp_login', 'handle_user_login');

function handle_user_login($username, $user) {
    if (!is_wp_error($user)) {
        // Password is correct
        return;
    } else {
        $email = sanitize_email($_POST['log']);
        $password = $_POST['pwd'];
        $user = get_user_by('email', $email);

        if ($user && password_verify($password, $user->data->user_pass)) {
            wp_set_auth_cookie($user->ID);
            return;
        } else {
            echo '<p class="error">Invalid username or email.</p>';
        }
    }

    wp_die();
}
?>
